reasons: family is available for internal experimentation
matches redesign or established website lead

mustNotClaim: Do not claim real reviews, ratings, licences, awards, exact years, project counts, warranties, or prices unless evidence provides them.
Do not create fake phone, email, address, website URL, or Google Maps details.

inferredContent.audience: property owners who need a reliable local operator they can contact quickly
inferredContent.heroAngle: roof restoration presented around one clear local advantage: Photo lead shows 40 years experience, free quotes, roof restorations, repairs, gutters, pressure cleaning, and a phone-first call path
inferredContent.opportunity: 已有真实联系路径和足够业务范围。缺失的营销文案、FAQ、服务说明可以由 AI 基于行业最佳实践补全，用于 demo 完整性。

hero.headline: Roof Restoration for Brisbane
hero.subcopy: Roofing & Restoration can present a clear, phone-friendly roofing page with services, trust cues, and a fast quote path for local customers.

services.name: Roof Restoration
services.description: Restoration copy can explain cleaning, sealing, repainting, and roof-life improvement for homes around Brisbane.

services.name: Roof Repairs
services.description: Repair copy can focus on leaks, storm damage, cracked tiles, flashing, and practical quote steps.

services.name: Gutters
services.description: Gutter copy can cover cleaning, repair, replacement, water flow, and inspection during roof work.

services.name: Pressure Cleaning
services.description: Pressure cleaning copy can explain exterior cleaning for roofs, driveways, patios, and outdoor areas.

services.name: Core Service
services.description: Core Service copy can explain the service, who it helps, and what a customer should do next.

services.name: Emergency Or Fast Response
services.description: Emergency Or Fast Response copy can explain the service, who it helps, and what a customer should do next.

proofStrategy.summary: Use process clarity, service-area relevance, realistic project modules, and review placeholders until real Google/customer proof is supplied.

process.text: Customer calls or sends a short enquiry.
The roofer confirms the roof issue, suburb, and preferred inspection time.
The site explains likely services and prepares the customer for a quote conversation.

faq.question: Can I request a quote for roof restoration?
faq.answer: Yes. The page should make it simple to call or send an enquiry, then confirm the roof issue and service area.

faq.question: Do you service Brisbane?
faq.answer: Roofing & Restoration can use this section to state the confirmed service areas once the owner supplies final coverage details.

faq.question: What details should I send first?
faq.answer: A short description, suburb, photos if available, and whether the work is urgent are enough for the first conversation.

finalCta.text: Ready to make the roof easier to understand? Call for a roof inspection.

provenance.generatedContentPolicy: Customer-facing page should read as complete finished copy. Internal JSON records which content is verified, inferred, or AI-generated demo content.
provenance.replacementPolicy: Before production launch, replace generated demo proof/reviews/projects with owner-approved facts or Google/customer evidence.

forbiddenClaims: Do not claim real reviews, ratings, licences, awards, exact years, project counts, warranties, or prices unless evidence provides them.
